chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 576 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.2521/2026 3. For hearing of main case 10.03.2026 Mr. Kamran Ali, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. A.G. Sindh along with PI Shaukat Ali, PS Sukhan, PI Allah Nawaz, PS Sukhan, SIP Noor Muhammad, PS Sukhan, SIP Badan Khan, PS Sukhan, ASIP Muhammad Ameen, PS Sukhan, PI Allaw Nawaz on behalf of DSP Malir and Raza Mian, DSP Legal-II, CPO. Mr. Tahir Hussain Mangi, APG. ------------------------------------ Reports along with copies of FIRs and Challans filed by SHO Police Station Sukhan, taken on record, hands over copy of the same to learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned Addl. A.G. submits that since the cases have been challaned therefore, petitioner may avail remedy under the law and instant petition may be disposed of having become infructuous. Since the case/FIRs, subject matter of this petition, have been challaned and is now pending trial before the competent court of jurisdiction, hence in view of dicta laid down by Apex Court in case of Director General, Anti-Corruption Establishment, Lahore and others Vs. Muhammad Akram Khan and others reported as PLD 2013 SC 401, this petition has become infructuous, which is hereby dismissed as having become infructuous. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to approach the learned trial Court for redressal of his grievances, if so advised. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
